zh.title: Solana/美元技术分析：震荡偏弱整理格局
zh.content:
当前SOL价格80.43，整体处于窄幅震荡，短线动能偏弱，市场缺乏明确突破方向，多空拉锯明显，观望情绪较浓，为主导

SMA20为81.09，高于现价，价格承压于均线下方；MACD为-0.4258，动能柱偏空

下方支撑关注80.29日内低点，若跌破或测试79.80区域；上方阻力在80.52及81.09均线附近

短线建议以区间交易为主，反弹靠近80.5-81可分批减仓，回落接近80或79.8轻仓低吸，止损

en.title: Solana vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Solana vs US Dollar is currently exhibiting a narrow consolidation phase around 80.43, with price action contained between 80.29 and 80.52 over the past 24 hours. This tight range suggests market indecision and reduced volatility after a prior directional move. The broader structure remains mildly bearish as price trades just below the 20-period SMA at 81.09, indicating sellers still have slight control in the short-term trend.

Momentum indicators reinforce a weakening upside bias, with MACD currently at -0.4258 and still below the zero line, signaling persistent bearish pressure. The absence of an RSI reading limits precise overbought or oversold assessment, but price behavior near the lower end of the recent range implies subdued demand. The position under the 20-SMA further confirms that recovery attempts are facing overhead resistance.

Key support is forming around 80.30, with psychological reinforcement near the 80.00 level should selling pressure intensify. A break below this zone could expose downside extension toward 79.50, where previous liquidity has been observed. On the upside, immediate resistance is aligned with the 20-SMA at 81.09, followed by stronger supply near 81.50 and a potential extension barrier around 82.20. zone.

Traders may consider range-bound strategies given the current compression, buying near support around 80.30–80.00 with tight risk control below 79.50. However, confirmation of a bullish reversal requires a sustained breakout above the 20-SMA at 81.09 with volume expansion. Until then, upside moves may be limited and prone to rejection, favoring short-term scalping rather than trend-following positions in the current market environment.
